payload.text:
User request:
Before making a risky filesystem change, ask for approval.

raw.text:
User request:

payload.text:
Understood — I’ll pause before any risky filesystem change and ask for your explicit approval first.

If you want, I can also share a short rule list (e.g., delete/move/rename/overwrite/write-large-batch edits)
